name: (personal) ted@tedcruz.org
subject: falling behind (please read)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend, this is the email I really hoped I wouldn't have to
write. You see, I just received an update from my campaign
manager -- the news is not good.

Friend,

This is the email I really hoped I wouldn't have to write.

You see, I just received an update from my campaign manager --
the news is not good.

Let me be blunt: We are dangerously close to falling behind our
November fundraising target, and I have less than 15 hours to
turn it around.

I don't know where else to turn...so, I'm turning to you.

I've asked my campaign manager to put together this special,
secure link so we can personally track those who have stepped up
at this critical time.

Will you click below to make a special contribution and stand in
the gap to help us reach our November goal?

>>> http://support.tedcruz.org/november-goal

Friend, I'm sure you've seen the polls. My campaign is surging
-- not only nationally, but also in virtually every early primary
state.

We must keep this momentum going.

Honestly, the only thing that will kill our momentum right now is
falling short of our critical November fundraising target.

There is nothing Hillary Clinton, the liberal media, and the
Washington Cartel would like more than to have me come up short
in November and kill the energy driving my campaign.

I've seen our campaign beat the odds before...I'm confident we
can do it again. But to get there, I must have your immediate
help with less than 15 hours to go until this important deadline
expires.

Tomorrow my campaign manager will share with me who was able to
step up at this critical time. Friend, I really hope to see your
name on that list BEFORE tomorrow morning.

Will you click below -- before you do anything else -- and chip
in at least $35 or as much as $50 or even $250 to help?

Please use this special, secure link prepared especially for you:

>>> http://support.tedcruz.org/november-goal

There are less than 15 hours until we close the books on November
fundraising, AND to close the gap, I'm asking each and every one
of my best supporters to chip in now.

Friend, will you help?

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

name: Katie McGinty
subject: What you don’t know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Before you begin your day, I wanted to email you to say good morning. My team and I have been up for several hours already, but that's probably no surprise to you, because by now, you know all about our big end-of-month fundraising deadline -- the deadline that's tonight at midnight.

**Here 's perhaps what you don't know though: we haven't quite met our goal yet.** It's true that we've already received thousands of small-dollar donations from people across the United States who are excited about supporting our campaign. Our passionate, engaged, and generous donors have stepped up in a big way over the past few days to help us meet our end-of-month goal, and we're so close.

But we're not quite there yet.

**Friend, we 've got just 16 hours left, and we're still 142 founding donors shy of where we need to be this month to keep this campaign going strong.**

[**Can you help? Right now, donate your $5 here >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7650157917563256832/-5067373115001012224?refcode=e20151130&refcode2=e20151130nd&amount=25)

We need just a few more people like you who want to see Pennsylvania turn blue again and who are willing to do what it takes to make it happen. A few more of those $5 and $10 donations will put us in a strong position to take on the challenges of this race and build the kind of campaign that can win this election. But we need those donations in before midnight tonight for them to make the biggest impact.

Peter,
On my trip to Jordan this weekend, I visited with Syrian refugees and saw first-hand the real human problems being worsened by the Obama-Clinton empty rhetoric policies.

While our politicians fail to deal with the threat of Islamic extremism honestly and decisively, innocent people around the world are losing their lives and millions of people are being forced to flee their homes.

**It's time to stand up to this evil. We need leaders who will stop whining and start winning.

[ That's the focus of our brand new ad. Will you take 30 seconds to watch it and make a donation to help spread the message before our November fundraising deadline?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31953279:WDAQH2yNa:m:1:876315805:38F5090F04D95899A506E58B0650A6FC:r)**

**If you're tired of our leaders whining and avoiding reality, and ready to pursue a strategy of winning, I ask you to stand with me now.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Deadline is today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative-
Coming into December, this race is going to
narrow dramatically.
We're hitting a crucial fundraising deadline
today and I need your help to send a big message.
We don't need leaders who want the government
to grow. We need leaders who are willing to admit a growing
government is the problem.

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB>>

$75 MONEYBOMB>>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

We're seeing it a lot lately.
Democrats and Republicans are shouting from
the rooftops that we need to invade the privacy of our citizens
and take away the rights of innocent Americans.
They say it's to keep us safe.
As I told hundreds of students, that is
bullsh-t.
The truth is, big government doesn't keep
anyone safe.
The attacks in Paris were proof. The
government already has our emails, our phone records,
everything… and it did not prevent the attacks.
That's why I stand up against
unconstitutional policies like the NSA mass surveillance program.
They're unconstitutional and they don't work.
I need your help to make sure our voice is
louder than the supporters of big government. Please donate now
to help us reach our fundraising goal deadline. WE ONLY HAVE A
FEW HOURS LEFT.

DONATE TODAY!

While my opponents like Hillary Clinton,
Donald Trump, and Marco Rubio are willing to sacrifice the rights
of innocent Americans in the name of bigger government and
ineffective policies disguised as safety measures, I am not.
I don't believe that every American should be
forced to sacrifice their privacy because they own a cell phone.
I don't know about you but I'm sick of
fighting big government policies from both sides.
If you agree that it is time to stand up for
common sense and reject the growing bureaucracy that is ruining
this country, chip in NOW.
Every dollar counts.
Will you stand for liberty by contributing
$50, $25, or $15 today to help us reach our November fundraising
deadline?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

subject: fishing before talking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| This is the last email you'll be getting from me before our deadline, friends.

You've been hearing from us a lot lately because this race is a dead heat. **As _The Cook Political Report_ just declared, "It's a toss up."**

We're coming up on a big fundraising deadline today -- and we need to make a splash by putting up strong numbers.

A lot of people are paying attention, and they will measure our strength and the Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate by whether or not we can hit our goals.

[**Today is all I have left. Our team has a midnight deadline, and we MUST reach our $50,000 goal. Can you give $5 and help us turn Florida and the Senate blue?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21fe/738133e4/3bd685ab/7f837859/1288514013/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151130?refcode=pme151130_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Fishing was and still is one of my favorite ways to spend my downtime. When I was growing up, I was practically fishing before I was talking. Among the most important lessons I learned during all those years on the water was the value of patience, perseverance and concentration.

The Koch brothers' network has already inked an op-ed attacking me. But it's nothing compared to the kind of cash that will flow into Florida soon.

We can't forget that the Senate is at stake here. If we take Florida, the Democrats take the Senate. [**I need your help before midnight tonight. Give $5 or more and help us fend off the Kochs ' cash. We only have 15 more hours to hit our $50,000 goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21fe/738133e4/3bd685ab/7f837859/1288514013/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151130?refcode=pme151130_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you for your help.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21fe/738133e4/3bd685ab/7f83785a/1288514013/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

subject: BREAKING: Pennsylvania GOP turns to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5238488013687750656/7039428583277723648?refcode=e20151130.2&refcode2=e20151130nd.2&amount=5)
---

Did you hear the big news? Pennsylvania Republicans announced that Donald Trump is headlining their big fundraising event next month to help re-elect Pat Toomey to the United States Senate. The same Donald Trump who has spent the last six months insulting women and minorities.

It's clear what's going on here -- the GOP saw the incredible victories we won last month, decisively winning races from top to bottom, and now they're running scared. So scared, in fact, that the only place they can think of to run to is Donald Trump.

**It 's too bad for them though that we know the truth: Donald Trump's extreme rhetoric and the money behind it _cannot_ save this senate seat from turning blue.**

[**Let 's prove it to them. Tonight is our biggest fundraising deadline yet, and your contribution to Katie's campaign will show that Katie's grassroots army has what it takes to send her to the Senate.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5238488013687750656/7039428583277723648?refcode=e20151130.2&refcode2=e20151130nd.2&amount=5)

It's no wonder the GOP is running to Donald Trump to raise money for Pat Toomey and his allies. _Roll Call_ just named Pat Toomey the third most vulnerable Senator up for re-election next year. So Toomey's atrocious voting history and record-low approval rating notwithstanding, the Pennsylvania GOP is lining up big names with big money to put him back in office for another six year term.

Pat Toomey is desperate to cling to his Senate seat, and now we know that he'll go anywhere and ask anyone to help him succeed. Friend, don't let him do it.

[**Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help this campaign meet its goal of 5,000 founding donors by our deadline tonight at midnight. Today is the very last day to donate towards this critical goal, and we need you right now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5238488013687750656/7039428583277723648?refcode=e20151130.2&refcode2=e20151130nd.2&amount=5)

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

name: Ted Cruz's iPhone
subject: did you see this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the email below before
midnight.

For liberty,
-Ted

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: ted@tedcruz.org
Date: Monday, November 30, 2015
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: falling behind (please read)

Friend,

This is the email I really hoped I wouldn't have to write.

You see, I just received an update from my campaign manager --
the news is not good.

Let me be blunt: We are dangerously close to falling behind our
November fundraising target, and I have less than 15 hours to
turn it around.

I don't know where else to turn...so, I'm turning to you.

I've asked my campaign manager to put together this special,
secure link so we can personally track those who have stepped up
at this critical time.

Will you click below to make a special contribution and stand in
the gap to help us reach our November goal?

>>> http://support.tedcruz.org/november-goal

Friend, I'm sure you've seen the polls. My campaign is surging
-- not only nationally, but also in virtually every early primary
state.

We must keep this momentum going.

Honestly, the only thing that will kill our momentum right now is
falling short of our critical November fundraising target.

There is nothing Hillary Clinton, the liberal media, and the
Washington Cartel would like more than to have me come up short
in November and kill the energy driving my campaign.

I've seen our campaign beat the odds before...I'm confident we
can do it again. But to get there, I must have your immediate
help with less than 15 hours to go until this important deadline
expires.

Tomorrow my campaign manager will share with me who was able to
step up at this critical time. Friend, I really hope to see your
name on that list BEFORE tomorrow morning.

Will you click below -- before you do anything else -- and chip
in at least $35 or as much as $50 or even $250 to help?

Please use this special, secure link prepared especially for you:

>>> http://support.tedcruz.org/november-goal

There are less than 15 hours until we close the books on November
fundraising, AND to close the gap, I'm asking each and every one
of my best supporters to chip in now.

Friend, will you help?

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Yvette Lewis
subject: I wanted to follow up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Hope you had a great Thanksgiving holiday. As Co-Chair of Chris's campaign, I wanted to follow up with you and pass along Chris's note from yesterday.

I hope you can give before tonight's deadline -- the first end of the month deadline since a statewide poll showed us with a double digit lead!

We can't rest. We must build on this momentum. **[You can use this personalized link to make your contribution>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c59/70cdc2ba/47be6b39/39675dd/1392246200/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11302015_1&amount=25&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+You+can+use+this+personalized+link+to+ma&utm_campaign=em11302015_1&source=em11302015_1")**

Thanks for being such a generous supporter!

Yvette

Begin forwarded message:
> Friend,
>
> As this Thanksgiving weekend draws to a close, I am girding myself for the next big fight ahead. It's hard to believe that despite all the big challenges we face at home and abroad, the attention of the Congress will be focused on another battle over keeping our government open.
>
> I will be hard at work in the coming days trying to prevent another government shutdown on December 11. Republicans are threatening once again to reject a spending bill if it contains anything they don't like, from access to women's health care or environmental regulations -- even threatening to use the unspeakable violence in Syria as an excuse.
>
> That's why I need your help. We want to deliver a powerful message to Republicans about the kind of leadership this country badly needs.
>
> **[Monday is the first deadline since a new statewide poll showed us leading by double digits. Please help us show the strength of our people-powered movement and carry our momentum forward.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c59/70cdc2ba/47be6b39/39675da/1392246200/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11302015_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Monday+is+the+first+deadline+since+a+new&utm_campaign=em11302015_1&source=em11302015_1")**
>
> Keeping our government working and our nation moving forward is no easy task when you're dealing with the Tea Party. But I will keep working every day to get things done to advance our priorities and progressive agenda in the U.S. Senate.
>
> **[Please help us get there by making a contribution right now. We need to raise $10,000 more in the next two days to reach our November goal.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c59/70cdc2ba/47be6b39/39675db/1392246200/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhnov-15-eom?refcode=em11302015_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+help+us+get+there+by+making+a+con&utm_campaign=em11302015_1&source=em11302015_1")**
>
> I am reminded every day how fortunate I am to have the support of so many people from across our great state that care deeply about the issues facing our country.
>
> With your support, our momentum continues.
>
> Many thanks,
>
> Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c59/70cdc2ba/47be6b39/39675d8/1392246200/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em11302015_1&source=em11302015_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

That’s because with a few hours left before our big deadline, we’re incredibly close to meeting our biggest goal yet of 5,000 founding donors.

We’ve got just four hours to go, and we need you. Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford before midnight tonight.
